title: grindelia inuloides var. glandulosa
intro: Grindelia inuloides var. glandulosa, also known as Sticky Grindelia, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, and to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Grindelia inuloides var. glandulosa is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or topical cream to harness its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing.
